done_claim_rule: A workstream may be marked done only after scripts/validate_bootstrap_tracker.py verifies every required artifact and named check. Prose evidence alone is insufficient.

datasets/registry.json records zero network acquisition and zero paid spend while defining versioned layer and hash policies; no real dataset is claimed.

Five provider-boundary schemas and five committed synthetic fixtures cover daily bars, active and delisted instruments, point-in-time membership, expired futures contracts, and an explicit continuous-series roll.
scripts/validate_data_layer.py passes with zero network and paid-data use; 60 hermetic tests pass and the state-audit tier skips loudly with missing LILY_DATA_ROOT when local state is absent.

orders.title: L-0 sizing feasibility study
evidence: The hash-bound preregistration and validator remain unchanged and scripts/validate_l_0_sizing_feasibility_preregistration.py passes.

The deterministic E0 report classifies all six capital/broker combinations as scope_restricted: 8- and 10-sleeve ETF economic sizing passes, but no exact broker path is fully verified; 12 sleeves fail the locked 25% notional-weight cap.

The locked futures formula produces micro minimum capital of USD 40,600, USD 54,200, and USD 95,400 and full-size comparator capital of USD 405,900, USD 541,200, and USD 1,614,600 for 4, 8, and 12 markets.
scripts/validate_l_0_sizing_feasibility_report.py verifies the calculation, report digest, JSON/Markdown agreement, E0/no-edge boundaries, and broker/futures scenario coverage.

orders.title: L-1 owner acceptance of corporate-action scope restriction
evidence: The owner explicitly accepted the unresolved corporate-action history as an E1 scope restriction, paused new and paid point-in-time source searches, and retained the B4.4 containers, hashes, mismatches, and claim limits without selecting provider values by performance impact.

experiments/l_1_corporate_action_scope_decision.json records L-1 as scope_restricted_E1, validation as sealed_not_accessed, and validation unlock, E2 promotion, immediate paper trade, and real money as unauthorized.

The prospective comparison is planned_not_started and limited to a separately preregistered E0 operational dry run with edge_claim none. The future gate must lock streams, fields, materiality thresholds, insufficient-event handling, and stop conditions before the first observation.

A future dry run may measure prospective cash, unit, target-weight, order-notional, and posting-delay differences, but it cannot prove historical return correctness, historical discrepancy immateriality, strategy edge, E2 validation, or deployment readiness.

orders.title: Webull Thailand production read-only capability probe
evidence: The locked B4.6 gate was committed and pushed before the first production API call. It permits only authentication plus account list, balance, positions, and one exact ten-symbol instrument query.

Webull Thailand production authentication, account list, balance, and positions returned successfully. Only field inventories and in-memory response hashes were retained; no Account ID, balance, buying power, holding, or quantity was persisted.
VTI, VGK, EWJ, IPAC, VWO, IEF, SCHP, GLDM, PDBC, and VNQI all returned status OC and fractionable true from the locked instrument query.
The request attestation records four read-only calls, zero preview calls, zero order endpoint calls, zero orders, and USD 0 spend.
The result is E0 operational capability evidence only. Validation returns remain sealed, and the probe does not authorize paper trading, shadow accounting, E2, edge, deployment, or real money.

orders.title: L-1 prospective shadow-accounting dry-run preregistration
forbidden: E2, edge, historical-correctness, or deployment claim
evidence: experiments/l_1_prospective_shadow_accounting_preregistration.json is locked under append-only gate l_1_prospective_shadow_accounting_v1 with contract SHA-256 ee17ecc385c0fadd808d7c5e5a5af0ab426c133994ff54ef4071e9a242c45d88 and validator SHA-256 e42631efac2d6a64bb74df98ba35653a7f5b15558e69415954843fc4fbbd3a4a.

The gate predeclares the Webull Thailand paper ledger as an operational reference, Alpha Vantage as a current-snapshot shadow ledger, and Lily's Yahoo-event ledger as the strategy-accounting stream; production or real-money substitution is forbidden.

The common accounting portfolio freezes the L-0 USD 1,000 ten-sleeve weights at 90% gross and 10% cash, uses only forward quotes after activation, and computes no trend signal, validation return, benchmark, or PnL.

Materiality is locked before observation: cash greater than max(USD 1, 5 bps NAV), units greater than max(0.0001 share, broker quantum), tracking weight greater than 10 bps, hypothetical order notional greater than max(USD 1, 10 bps NAV), or posting delay beyond two US sessions. Opposite discrepancies may not be netted.

Sufficient operational evidence requires at least 180 days plus three matched events across two symbols, with a 365-day hard stop. Too few events is insufficient evidence; any event-level breach reopens the point-in-time source program and blocks automatic promotion.

B4.7 made no broker or provider call, observed no prospective event, opened no validation data, authorized no activation or paper order, and made no E2, edge, historical-return, execution-quality, deployment, or real-money claim.

orders.title: L-1 shadow-accounting activation contract and readiness boundary
forbidden: E2, edge, historical-correctness, deployment, or real-money claim
evidence: experiments/l_1_shadow_accounting_activation_contract.json is locked under append-only gate l_1_shadow_accounting_activation_v1 with contract SHA-256 62d23376a83823b6b710afb2dc74fdaf2f04d008c79a88a71a2b6dc06bff4d79 and validator SHA-256 8f0bce4261ad6bc26976eae4904152578de2e0b810a8103b2ec718526af67e55.

Public Webull Thailand documentation confirms production and test hosts plus shared test accounts, but warns that shared positions and orders may change at any time. No dedicated owner-controlled test account was verified or used.

The published Thailand endpoint inventory lacks account cash-activity, account corporate-action, dividend/split ledger, and corporate-action event-subscription paths. Fractionable flags and decimal inputs are documented, but minimum fractional share quantum is not.

B4.8 therefore locks activation_blocked_before_observation with empty runtime network and order allowlists, null forward markers, zero broker/provider request caps, no production fallback, and four explicit activation blockers.

Event and report schemas plus three immutable synthetic fixtures exercise no-material, material-breach, and activation-blocked decisions. The report validator recomputes strict-greater materiality, prevents cross-event netting, verifies evidence minimums, requires zero order/production calls, and retains the validation seal.

B4.8 performed public-document and source-code inspection only: zero account, broker, provider, preview, order, market-data, or prospective-event calls; USD 0 spend; validation remained sealed and the dry run did not start.

The future probe is preregistered for Webull Thailand UAT only, VTI only, POST /openapi/trade/order/preview only, and eight fixed QTY values from 1 through 0.0000001. Production, balance, positions, order state, retries, AMOUNT mode, and every order-mutating or order-query endpoint are forbidden.

orders.title: Webull Thailand UAT fractional-preview machinery gate
forbidden: place, replace, cancel, history, open-order, or order-detail endpoint
paper trade, E2, edge, execution-quality, deployment, or real-money claim
evidence: Gate l_0_webull_th_fractional_preview_probe_v1 locks B4.10 with contract SHA-256 4bfee4a8cd69b069988913121898fd6affd8642380b0ed877f377872bef3c77e and validator SHA-256 8eeb84e287d17adb99e50f3b8ac6294652ed53dff1073de500fba51c48e68df6.
The runner is fail-closed: it requires --execute plus a future separately hash-locked B4.11 activation artifact before credential reads, SDK import, authentication, or preview execution.

The request guard permits at most three authentication requests and eight POST /openapi/trade/order/preview requests to th-api.uat.webullbroker.com for VTI using the exact locked QTY grid. It blocks production, retries, AMOUNT mode, balance, positions, and every order mutation or query path.

The runner uses generic ApiRequest for the official Thailand path because the pinned SDK 2.0.13 PreviewOrderRequest helper uses /openapi/trade/stock/order/preview and documents HK/US rather than Thailand support.

The report schema, validator, and three hash-bound synthetic fixtures cover all-accepted, mixed, and pre-preview-blocked outcomes. Tests recompute summaries and decisions, enforce request caps and the validation seal, and block tampering.
B4.10 made zero broker, provider, authentication, preview, order, or validation requests; sent zero orders; incurred USD 0 spend; and created no research log because no experiment was executed.

orders.title: Webull Thailand UAT fractional-preview activation and execution
forbidden: place, replace, cancel, history, open-order, or order-detail endpoint
more than three authentication, eight preview, or eleven total requests
raw response, credential, token, or account identifier persistence
paper trade, fill, exact all-symbol minimum, execution-quality, E2, edge, deployment, or real-money claim
evidence: The owner explicitly authorized creation of B4.11 and one bounded Webull Thailand UAT fractional-preview execution on 2026-07-20.

Gate l_0_webull_th_fractional_preview_activation_v1 locks the B4.10 contract SHA-256 4bfee4a8cd69b069988913121898fd6affd8642380b0ed877f377872bef3c77e and runner SHA-256 edec1e1658c74abb87d116b2680d4a292481bbce3eec6d18984634f2369aa06a.

The activation allows only the exact VTI QTY matrix on th-api.uat.webullbroker.com after the gate is committed and pushed. Production, orders, balance, positions, retries, AMOUNT mode, providers, validation, and real money remain forbidden.

The first preflight attempt stopped before network access because the three UAT variables were absent. The later authorized execution loaded the official shared-test row in process memory only and persisted no credential or account identifier.

The guarded execution made three authentication requests: one token create and two token checks. The request guard blocked the fourth authentication attempt, so the decision is blocked_before_preview with zero preview requests, zero order endpoints, zero orders, zero production requests, and USD 0 spend.
B4.11 made three public-document requests: the official SDK page twice and llms.txt once. Shared UAT values were loaded only in process memory for the authorized run and were not persisted.

SDK 2.0.13 source inspection shows a five-second token-check interval and a 300-second default duration. The locked three-request authentication budget is therefore incompatible with the SDK polling loop when the token does not become NORMAL within the first two checks.

The redacted report passes its validator and Thai research log 007 records the E0 scope restriction. Validation returns remain sealed; no fill, fractional minimum, all-symbol, production, execution-quality, edge, E2, deployment, or real-money claim is made.

orders.title: Webull Thailand UAT authentication-budget remediation and one bounded execution
forbidden: place, replace, cancel, history, open-order, or order-detail endpoint
automatic retry or polling beyond 30 seconds
more than one token create, seven token checks, eight preview, or sixteen total broker requests
raw response, credential, token, or account identifier persistence
paper trade, fill, exact all-symbol minimum, execution-quality, E2, edge, deployment, or real-money claim

The v2 runner fixes the authentication budget to one token-create plus at most seven token checks over 30 seconds at five-second intervals, retains eight VTI preview requests, caps all broker requests at sixteen, disables retry, and keeps tokens in process memory only.
Gate commit 152c8e1e8ecc946b889472707b4b3280e63d4e02 was pushed to origin/main and Hermetic CI run 29721298183 passed before any B4.12 credential read or broker request.

The one authorized execution loaded the first official shared-UAT row in process memory only and made one token-create plus seven token-check requests over the locked 30-second window. Authentication did not become NORMAL, so the decision is blocked_before_preview with zero preview requests.
The redacted report passes its validator. Forbidden, production, order-mutation/query, order, provider, validation, and paid requests are all zero; no raw response or private material was persisted.

Thai research log 008 records the E0 scope restriction. The validation window remains sealed, no fractional minimum is known, and B4.12 cannot be rerun without a new owner-approved gate backed by new evidence.

orders.title: Webull Thailand UAT authentication documentation evidence review
forbidden: authentication, app, SMS, or two-factor flow
credential, token, or account-identifier read or persistence
production, preview, order, paper-trading, or real-money action
fractional-minimum, execution-quality, E2, edge, deployment, or real-money claim
evidence: The owner approved B4.13 as a static official-documentation review after B4.12; this order authorizes no broker or provider request.

A 2026-07-23 retrieval of https://developer.webull.co.th/apis/docs/sdk.md returned HTTP 200, Last-Modified 2026-07-19T03:14:09Z, ETag W/"131f-19f785def7f", and redacted-content SHA-256 614ef29ba9978573a181ebdf04f6bd321c8874ae386669d1d90359342c13f866. No credential values were printed, persisted, or used.

The SDK markdown references a Thailand UAT host and terms for two-factor authentication, verification, and test accounts, but this reference does not establish a publicly available UAT service or access entitlement. It does not document owner-controlled UAT-account provisioning or a non-interactive authentication path.

The public Webull Thailand developer documentation currently exposes Trade API and Market Data API getting-started surfaces only. Therefore Lily has no verified access to a shared UAT environment for a further probe unless genuinely new official evidence or a dedicated owner-controlled test account appears. This is an E0 operational scope decision only; it does not establish a broker defect, fractional-preview result, production capability, or execution outcome.

No locked gate is created because B4.13 is static documentation review only. Any future broker probe still requires new evidence, explicit owner approval, and a new locked gate; B4.11 and B4.12 remain one-run-only.
